title: Linai and the Royal Meadow
description: Linai drifts through a sunny flower field and meets a queen, then a king, on a magical day.

acts.approachText: Linai is drifting lazily through a sun-drenched meadow bursting with colorful wildflowers when she spots a regal queen standing gracefully among the blooms. The queen holds a single golden flower and gazes around with a serene, slightly lonely expression. Linai's eyes widen softly, her body relaxes outward into a warm glow, and tiny sparkles drift upward inside her cloud. She hovers at a respectful distance, tilting slightly as she tries to figure out the right way to greet someone so magnificent. Her vapor trails curl with gentle curiosity.

choices.label: Surge forward and glow brightly
choices.outcomeText: Linai surges forward too eagerly, expanding into a big bright flash right in front of the queen's face. The queen stumbles back a step, her crown tilting sideways, and she fans her hand in front of her eyes with a startled expression. Linai contracts immediately, her glow dimming to a sheepish flicker, and she drifts backward with a flat, apologetic look — both eyes angled toward the viewer as if to say 'too much.' The queen straightens her crown and blinks, not upset, just surprised.

choices.label: Drift close and pulse softly
choices.outcomeText: Linai drifts forward slowly, her body settling into a calm, warm amber glow with gentle swirling patterns inside. She pulses softly — a slow, rhythmic shimmer like a lantern in a breeze. The queen notices, and her expression melts into a delighted smile. She lifts the golden flower toward Linai, who hovers just beside it, her internal sparkles brightening with sincere delight. The two share a quiet, beautiful moment among the flowers, the queen laughing softly as Linai's vapor trails curl upward in pure joy.

acts.approachText: Linai floats onward through the meadow, still glowing warmly from her lovely moment with the queen, when she rounds a cluster of tall flowering trees and discovers a king standing in a sunny clearing. He is broad and dignified, wearing a deep crimson robe and a heavy golden crown, and he appears to be searching for something — his eyes scan the field with a puzzled, slightly forlorn expression. Linai tilts in the air, her internal patterns shifting to curious little question-mark swirls. She senses he is looking for the queen. Her vapor trails perk upward with purpose.

choices.label: Phase through the flowers toward him
choices.outcomeText: Linai dissolves into a low mist and streams through the flower clusters toward the king, intending to guide him. But she moves so fast and low that she startles a cluster of butterflies resting in the grass, sending them fluttering in a colorful explosion right into the king's face. He sputters, waving his arms, his crown sliding down over his eyes. Linai re-forms nearby, her body contracting with a guilty shimmer, both eyes wide and apologetic. The king pushes his crown back up and chuckles despite himself, but he is still lost.

choices.label: Glow and drift back toward the queen
choices.outcomeText: Linai expands gently and pulses a warm golden glow, then begins drifting slowly back in the direction of the queen, pausing to look back at the king with wide, inviting eyes. The king watches her, tilts his head, then understands — he follows. Linai leads him through the flower-filled meadow, her vapor trails streaming ahead like a glowing ribbon. When the king and queen finally see each other across the blooms, their faces light up. The king laughs, the queen smiles, and Linai rises high above them both, her body expanding with pure delight, sparkles cascading from her cloud as the sunny meadow glows all around them.
